sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60991" key="kupelloma/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠπελλομάχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n60991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at which they fight with cups</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰλαπίνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.59</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
